# Helpers functions

These are some helper functions that are needed for the MCMC.

These functions are not documented for now. (TODO: do this).

<!-- send_to to put all helper functions into one file.. -->

```{r, send_to = 'R/all-helpers.R'}
#' A helper function to print the progress of a simulation. Place directly at
#' the beginning of the loop, before any computation happens.
#' @param isim isim.
#' @param nsim number of sim.
#' @param type type of job you're running. Defaults to "simulation".
#' @param lapsetime lapsed time, in seconds (by default).
#' @param lapsetimeunit "second".
#' @param start.time Start time, usually obtained using \code{Sys.time()}
#' @param fill Whether or not to fill the line.
#' @param beep Whether to beep when done.
printprogress <- function(isim, nsim, type="simulation", lapsetime=NULL,
                          lapsetimeunit="seconds", start.time=NULL,
                          fill=FALSE, beep=FALSE){

    ## If lapse time is present, then use it
    if(fill) cat(fill=TRUE)
    if(is.null(lapsetime) & is.null(start.time)){
            cat("\r", type, " ", isim, "out of", nsim)
    } else {
        if(!is.null(start.time)){
          if(isim == 1){
            lapsetime = 0
            remainingtime = "unknown"
            endtime = "unknown time"
          } else {
            lapsetime = round(difftime(Sys.time(), start.time,
                                       units = "secs"), 0)
            remainingtime = round(lapsetime * (nsim - (isim - 1)) / (isim - 1), 0)
            endtime = strftime((Sys.time() + remainingtime))
          }
        }
        cat("\r", type, " ", isim, "out of", nsim, "with lapsed time",
            lapsetime, lapsetimeunit, "and remaining time", remainingtime,
            lapsetimeunit, "and will finish at", endtime, ".")
        if(beep & isim==nsim){beepr::beep()}
    }
    if(fill) cat(fill=TRUE)
}

#' Stable computation of the log-sum-exp function.
#'
#' @param x Numeric vector.
logsumexp <- function(x){
    m <- max(x)
    ret <- m + log(sum(exp(x - m)))
    return(ret)
}

#' Helper function to sample from a Dirichlet distribution.
#'
#' @param alpha Numeric vector of Dirichlet concentration parameters.
rdirichlet1 <- function(alpha){
    z <- rgamma(length(alpha), shape = alpha, rate = 1)
    ret <- z / sum(z)
    return(ret)
}

#' Helper function to compute a Cholesky factor for a numerically symmetric
#' positive definite matrix.
#'
#' @param Sigma Covariance matrix.
chol_spd <- function(Sigma){
    Sigma <- (Sigma + t(Sigma)) / 2
    p <- nrow(Sigma)

    for(eps in c(0, 1e-10, 1e-8, 1e-6, 1e-4)){
        out <- try(chol(Sigma + eps * diag(p)), silent = TRUE)
        if(!inherits(out, "try-error")){
            return(out)
        }
    }

    stop("Matrix is not numerically positive definite.")
}

#' Helper function to sample from a multivariate normal distribution.
#'
#' @param mu Mean vector.
#' @param Sigma Covariance matrix.
rmvn <- function(mu, Sigma){
    R <- chol_spd(Sigma)
    ret <- as.vector(mu + t(R) %*% rnorm(length(mu)))
    return(ret)
}

#' Helper function to compute cluster counts and cluster-specific sums.
#'
#' @param Z Vector of cluster allocations.
#' @param Y Matrix of observations.
#' @param K Number of clusters.
cluster_stats <- function(Z, Y, K){
    TT <- ncol(Y)

    N <- tabulate(Z, nbins = K)
    S <- matrix(0, nrow = K, ncol = TT)

    for(k in seq_len(K)){
        idx <- which(Z == k)
        if(length(idx) > 0){
            S[k, ] <- colSums(Y[idx, , drop = FALSE])
        }
    }

    ret <- list(N = N, S = S)
    return(ret)
}

#' Helper function to compute eta from theta and the design matrix.
#'
#' @param theta Array of parameters.
#' @param Fmat Design matrix.
get_eta <- function(theta, Fmat){
    K <- dim(theta)[1]
    TT <- dim(theta)[2]
    p <- dim(theta)[3]

    eta <- matrix(0, nrow = K, ncol = TT)

    for(k in seq_len(K)){
        theta_k <- matrix(theta[k, , ], nrow = TT, ncol = p)
        eta[k, ] <- rowSums(Fmat * theta_k)
    }

    return(eta)
}

#' Helper function to compute lambda from theta and the design matrix.
#'
#' @param theta Array of parameters.
#' @param Fmat Design matrix.
get_lambda <- function(theta, Fmat){
    ret <- exp(get_eta(theta, Fmat))
    return(ret)
}


#' Compute Adjusted Rand Index for clustering accuracy.
#'
#' @param x First clustering vector.
#' @param y Second clustering vector.
#' 
#' @export 
adj_rand_index <- function(x, y){
    tab <- table(x, y)

    choose2 <- function(z) z * (z - 1) / 2

    nij <- as.vector(tab)
    ai  <- rowSums(tab)
    bj  <- colSums(tab)

    sum_nij <- sum(choose2(nij))
    sum_ai  <- sum(choose2(ai))
    sum_bj  <- sum(choose2(bj))

    n <- sum(tab)
    total <- choose2(n)

    expected <- sum_ai * sum_bj / total
    max_idx  <- 0.5 * (sum_ai + sum_bj)

    if(max_idx == expected) return(0)

    ret <- (sum_nij - expected) / (max_idx - expected)
    return(ret)
}

#' Compute best label accuracy over all permutations.
#'
#' @param true True cluster labels.
#' @param est Estimated cluster labels.
#' @param K Number of clusters.
#' 
#' @export 
best_label_accuracy <- function(true, est, K){
    perms <- as.matrix(expand.grid(rep(list(seq_len(K)), K)))
    perms <- perms[apply(perms, 1, function(z) length(unique(z)) == K), , drop = FALSE]

    acc <- apply(perms, 1, function(map){
        mean(true == map[est])
    })

    ret <- max(acc)
    return(ret)
}

#' Compute the mode of an integer vector.
#'
#' @param x Integer vector.
#' @param K Maximum possible value (number of bins).
mode_int <- function(x, K){
    ret <- which.max(tabulate(x, nbins = K))
    return(ret)
}
```


## SANDNM helpers

The following helper functions support the spatially adaptive neighborhood dynamic network model (SANDNM) simulation study.

```{r sandnm-helpers, send_to = 'R/all-helpers.R'}
#' SANDNM helper functions here
#' Fourier seasonal features for SANDNM.
#'
#' @param t_global Time index.
#' @param steps_day Number of time points per day.
#' @param harmonics Number of Fourier harmonics.
sandnm_season_features <- function(t_global, steps_day = 48, harmonics = 2){
    if(harmonics <= 0) return(numeric(0))
    h <- (t_global - 1) %% steps_day
    out <- numeric(2 * harmonics)
    nm <- character(2 * harmonics)
    for(j in seq_len(harmonics)){
        angle <- 2 * pi * j * h / steps_day
        out[2 * j - 1] <- sin(angle)
        out[2 * j] <- cos(angle)
        nm[2 * j - 1] <- paste0("sin", j)
        nm[2 * j] <- paste0("cos", j)
    }
    names(out) <- nm
    return(out)
}

#' Baseline dimension for SANDNM.
sandnm_baseline_dim <- function(harmonics = 2){
    return(1 + 2 * harmonics)
}

#' Numerically stable Cholesky factorization.
sandnm_chol_safe <- function(A, jitter = 1e-8, max_tries = 6){
    A <- (A + t(A)) / 2
    for(i in seq_len(max_tries)){
        out <- tryCatch(chol(A + diag(jitter, nrow(A))), error = function(e) NULL)
        if(!is.null(out)) return(out)
        jitter <- jitter * 10
    }
    return(chol(A + diag(jitter, nrow(A))))
}

#' Inverse of a symmetric positive definite matrix.
sandnm_inv_spd <- function(A){
    return(chol2inv(sandnm_chol_safe(A)))
}

#' Multivariate normal draw using a Cholesky factor.
sandnm_rmvn_chol <- function(mu, Sigma){
    U <- sandnm_chol_safe(Sigma)
    return(as.numeric(mu + t(U) %*% rnorm(length(mu))))
}

#' Vectorized Polya--Gamma sampler.
sandnm_rpg_vec <- function(b, z){
    if(requireNamespace("BayesLogit", quietly = TRUE)){
        return(BayesLogit::rpg(num = length(z), h = b, z = z))
    }
    stop("Package 'BayesLogit' is required for sandnm_rpg_vec().")
}

#' Log harmonic mean of exponential log values.
sandnm_log_hmean_exp <- function(logx){
    a <- max(-logx)
    return(-(a + log(mean(exp(-logx - a)))))
}

#' Log-density of a half-Cauchy distribution up to numerical constants.
sandnm_log_half_cauchy <- function(x, scale){
    return(ifelse(x > 0, log(2 / pi) + log(scale) - log(x^2 + scale^2), -Inf))
}

#' Progress message with estimated remaining time.
sandnm_eta_message <- function(label, iter, total_iter, start_time){
    now <- Sys.time()
    elapsed_sec <- as.numeric(difftime(now, start_time, units = "secs"))
    sec_per_iter <- elapsed_sec / max(iter, 1)
    remain_sec <- sec_per_iter * max(total_iter - iter, 0)
    finish_time <- now + remain_sec
    return(paste0(
        "[", format(now, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "] ",
        label, " | iter ", iter, "/", total_iter,
        " (", sprintf("%.1f", 100 * iter / total_iter), "%)",
        " | elapsed ", sprintf("%.1f", elapsed_sec / 60), " min",
        " | remaining ", sprintf("%.1f", remain_sec / 60), " min",
        " | expected finish: ", format(finish_time, "%H:%M:%S")
    ))
}

#' Construct lagged covariates from count data.
sandnm_make_lag_covariates <- function(Y, y0, center = log(8), scale_x = 2){
    TT <- nrow(Y)
    E <- ncol(Y)
    Xlag <- matrix(NA_real_, TT, E)
    for(tt in seq_len(TT)){
        y_lag <- if(tt == 1) y0 else Y[tt - 1, ]
        Xlag[tt, ] <- (log1p(y_lag) - center) / scale_x
    }
    return(Xlag)
}

#' Construct edge-wise block design matrices.
sandnm_make_X_blocks <- function(Y, y0, pair_table, t_start = 1,
                                 steps_day = 48, harmonics = 2,
                                 center = log(8), scale_x = 2){
    TT <- nrow(Y)
    E <- ncol(Y)
    B <- sandnm_baseline_dim(harmonics)
    Xlag <- sandnm_make_lag_covariates(Y, y0, center, scale_x)

    if(harmonics > 0){
        base_names <- c("intercept", unlist(lapply(seq_len(harmonics), function(j){
            c(paste0("sin", j), paste0("cos", j))
        })))
    } else {
        base_names <- "intercept"
    }

    S <- matrix(1, nrow = TT, ncol = B)
    colnames(S) <- base_names
    if(B > 1){
        for(tt in seq_len(TT)){
            S[tt, 2:B] <- sandnm_season_features(t_start + tt - 1, steps_day, harmonics)
        }
    }

    X_blocks <- vector("list", E)
    pair_blocks <- vector("list", E)
    for(e in seq_len(E)){
        rows_e <- which(pair_table$target == e)
        pt_e <- pair_table[rows_e, , drop = FALSE]
        q <- nrow(pt_e)
        X_e <- matrix(0, nrow = TT, ncol = B + q)
        X_e[, seq_len(B)] <- S
        if(q > 0){
            X_e[, B + seq_len(q)] <- Xlag[, pt_e$source, drop = FALSE]
        }
        colnames(X_e) <- c(base_names, pt_e$pair_name)
        X_blocks[[e]] <- X_e
        pair_blocks[[e]] <- pt_e
    }

    attr(X_blocks, "B") <- B
    attr(X_blocks, "E") <- E
    attr(X_blocks, "T") <- TT
    attr(X_blocks, "steps_day") <- steps_day
    attr(X_blocks, "harmonics") <- harmonics
    attr(X_blocks, "center") <- center
    attr(X_blocks, "scale_x") <- scale_x
    attr(X_blocks, "t_start") <- t_start
    attr(X_blocks, "pair_blocks") <- pair_blocks
    return(X_blocks)
}

#' Compute linear predictors for fixed block states.
sandnm_compute_eta_blocks <- function(X_blocks, theta_blocks){
    E <- length(X_blocks)
    TT <- nrow(X_blocks[[1]])
    eta <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = TT, ncol = E)
    for(e in seq_len(E)){
        eta[, e] <- rowSums(X_blocks[[e]] * theta_blocks[[e]])
    }
    return(eta)
}

#' Compute linear predictors for shrinkage block states.
sandnm_compute_eta_blocks_scaled <- function(X_blocks, beta_blocks, lambda_blocks){
    E <- length(X_blocks)
    TT <- nrow(X_blocks[[1]])
    eta <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = TT, ncol = E)
    for(e in seq_len(E)){
        eta[, e] <- rowSums(X_blocks[[e]] * sweep(beta_blocks[[e]], 2, lambda_blocks[[e]], `*`))
    }
    return(eta)
}

#' Gaussian FFBS for a univariate observation block.
sandnm_ffbs_univ_dlm <- function(y, omega, X, W_diag, m0, C0, sample_state = TRUE){
    TT <- length(y)
    p <- length(m0)
    m <- matrix(NA_real_, TT, p)
    a <- matrix(NA_real_, TT, p)
    C <- array(NA_real_, dim = c(p, p, TT))
    R <- array(NA_real_, dim = c(p, p, TT))

    m_prev <- m0
    C_prev <- C0
    W <- diag(W_diag, p)
    loglik <- 0

    for(tt in seq_len(TT)){
        f_t <- X[tt, ]
        a_t <- m_prev
        R_t <- C_prev + W
        Rinv_t <- sandnm_inv_spd(R_t)
        P_t <- Rinv_t + omega[tt] * tcrossprod(f_t)
        C_t <- sandnm_inv_spd(P_t)
        e_t <- y[tt] - sum(f_t * a_t)
        z_t <- omega[tt] * f_t * e_t
        m_t <- a_t + as.numeric(C_t %*% z_t)
        Q_t <- 1 / omega[tt] + as.numeric(t(f_t) %*% R_t %*% f_t)
        loglik <- loglik + dnorm(e_t, mean = 0, sd = sqrt(Q_t), log = TRUE)

        a[tt, ] <- a_t
        R[, , tt] <- R_t
        m[tt, ] <- m_t
        C[, , tt] <- C_t
        m_prev <- m_t
        C_prev <- C_t
    }

    if(!sample_state){
        return(list(m = m, C = C, a = a, R = R, loglik = loglik))
    }

    theta <- matrix(NA_real_, TT, p)
    theta[TT, ] <- sandnm_rmvn_chol(m[TT, ], C[, , TT])
    if(TT > 1){
        for(tt in (TT - 1):1){
            B_t <- C[, , tt] %*% sandnm_inv_spd(R[, , tt + 1])
            mean_t <- m[tt, ] + as.numeric(B_t %*% (theta[tt + 1, ] - a[tt + 1, ]))
            Cov_t <- C[, , tt] - B_t %*% R[, , tt + 1] %*% t(B_t)
            Cov_t <- (Cov_t + t(Cov_t)) / 2
            theta[tt, ] <- sandnm_rmvn_chol(mean_t, Cov_t)
        }
    }
    return(list(theta = theta, m = m, C = C, a = a, R = R, loglik = loglik))
}

#' Block PG-FFBS for a fixed-neighborhood SANDNM.
sandnm_run_pgffbs_fixed_blocks <- function(Y, y0, pair_table, t_start = 1,
                                           steps_day = 48, harmonics = 2,
                                           center = log(8), scale_x = 2,
                                           r_pg = NULL, n_iter = 500,
                                           burn = 250, thin = 2,
                                           state_sd_baseline = NULL,
                                           state_sd_pair = 0.0015,
                                           verbose = TRUE,
                                           progress_every = 20,
                                           label = "fixed-block"){
    TT <- nrow(Y)
    E <- ncol(Y)
    B <- sandnm_baseline_dim(harmonics)
    X_blocks <- sandnm_make_X_blocks(Y, y0, pair_table, t_start, steps_day, harmonics, center, scale_x)

    if(is.null(r_pg)) r_pg <- ceiling((max(Y) + 2 * sqrt(max(Y))) * 50)
    if(is.null(state_sd_baseline)) state_sd_baseline <- c(0.0020, rep(0.0008, B - 1))

    bmat <- Y + r_pg
    kappa <- (Y - r_pg) / 2
    log_r <- log(r_pg)

    theta_blocks <- vector("list", E)
    state_sd_blocks <- vector("list", E)
    m0_blocks <- vector("list", E)
    C0_blocks <- vector("list", E)

    for(e in seq_len(E)){
        p_e <- ncol(X_blocks[[e]])
        q_e <- p_e - B
        m0_e <- c(log(mean(Y[, e]) + 0.1), rep(0, B - 1), rep(0, q_e))
        names(m0_e) <- colnames(X_blocks[[e]])
        C0_e <- diag(c(0.6, rep(0.35, B - 1), rep(0.20, q_e))^2)
        sd_e <- c(state_sd_baseline, rep(state_sd_pair, q_e))
        theta_blocks[[e]] <- matrix(rep(m0_e, TT), nrow = TT, byrow = TRUE)
        colnames(theta_blocks[[e]]) <- colnames(X_blocks[[e]])
        state_sd_blocks[[e]] <- sd_e
        m0_blocks[[e]] <- m0_e
        C0_blocks[[e]] <- C0_e
    }

    n_save <- floor((n_iter - burn) / thin)
    thetaT_save <- vector("list", E)
    for(e in seq_len(E)) thetaT_save[[e]] <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n_save, ncol = ncol(X_blocks[[e]]))
    loglik_trace <- numeric(n_iter)
    lambda_fit_sum <- matrix(0, nrow = TT, ncol = E)

    start_time <- Sys.time()
    if(verbose) message("Starting ", label, " at ", format(start_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"))

    save_id <- 0
    for(it in seq_len(n_iter)){
        eta <- sandnm_compute_eta_blocks(X_blocks, theta_blocks)
        omega_vec <- sandnm_rpg_vec(as.vector(bmat), as.vector(eta - log_r))
        Omega <- matrix(omega_vec, nrow = TT, ncol = E)
        Ystar <- log_r + kappa / Omega

        loglik_it <- 0
        for(e in seq_len(E)){
            ff <- sandnm_ffbs_univ_dlm(
                y = Ystar[, e], omega = Omega[, e], X = X_blocks[[e]],
                W_diag = state_sd_blocks[[e]]^2, m0 = m0_blocks[[e]],
                C0 = C0_blocks[[e]], sample_state = TRUE
            )
            theta_blocks[[e]] <- ff$theta
            loglik_it <- loglik_it + ff$loglik
        }
        loglik_trace[it] <- loglik_it

        if(it > burn && ((it - burn) %% thin == 0)){
            save_id <- save_id + 1
            eta_save <- pmin(pmax(sandnm_compute_eta_blocks(X_blocks, theta_blocks), -8), 8)
            lambda_fit_sum <- lambda_fit_sum + exp(eta_save)
            for(e in seq_len(E)) thetaT_save[[e]][save_id, ] <- theta_blocks[[e]][TT, ]
        }

        if(verbose && (it == 1 || it %% progress_every == 0 || it == n_iter)){
            message(sandnm_eta_message(label, it, n_iter, start_time))
        }
    }

    return(list(
        type = "fixed-block", label = label, pair_table = pair_table,
        X_blocks = X_blocks, theta_blocks_last = theta_blocks,
        thetaT_save = thetaT_save, loglik_trace = loglik_trace,
        working_log_RB = sandnm_log_hmean_exp(loglik_trace[(burn + 1):n_iter]),
        lambda_fit_mean = lambda_fit_sum / max(save_id, 1), burn = burn,
        thin = thin, r_pg = r_pg, state_sd_blocks = state_sd_blocks,
        t_train = TT, t_start = t_start, steps_day = steps_day,
        harmonics = harmonics, center = center, scale_x = scale_x
    ))
}

#' Block PG-FFBS for a shrinkage SANDNM.
sandnm_run_pgffbs_shrinkage_blocks <- function(Y, y0, pair_table, t_start = 1,
                                               steps_day = 48, harmonics = 2,
                                               center = log(8), scale_x = 2,
                                               r_pg = NULL, n_iter = 500,
                                               burn = 250, thin = 2,
                                               sigma_lambda = 0.8,
                                               phi_lambda = 0.55,
                                               mh_step = 0.12,
                                               lambda_update_every = 2,
                                               state_sd_baseline = NULL,
                                               state_sd_beta = 0.0015,
                                               verbose = TRUE,
                                               progress_every = 20,
                                               label = "shrinkage-block"){
    TT <- nrow(Y)
    E <- ncol(Y)
    B <- sandnm_baseline_dim(harmonics)
    X_blocks <- sandnm_make_X_blocks(Y, y0, pair_table, t_start, steps_day, harmonics, center, scale_x)
    pair_blocks <- attr(X_blocks, "pair_blocks")

    if(is.null(r_pg)) r_pg <- ceiling((max(Y) + 2 * sqrt(max(Y))) * 50)
    if(is.null(state_sd_baseline)) state_sd_baseline <- c(0.0020, rep(0.0008, B - 1))

    bmat <- Y + r_pg
    kappa <- (Y - r_pg) / 2
    log_r <- log(r_pg)

    beta_blocks <- lambda_blocks <- lambda_scale_blocks <- vector("list", E)
    state_sd_blocks <- m0_blocks <- C0_blocks <- vector("list", E)

    for(e in seq_len(E)){
        pt_e <- pair_blocks[[e]]
        p_e <- ncol(X_blocks[[e]])
        q_e <- p_e - B
        m0_e <- c(log(mean(Y[, e]) + 0.1), rep(0, B - 1), rep(0, q_e))
        names(m0_e) <- colnames(X_blocks[[e]])
        C0_e <- diag(c(0.6, rep(0.35, B - 1), rep(0.35, q_e))^2)
        sd_e <- c(state_sd_baseline, rep(state_sd_beta, q_e))
        if(q_e > 0){
            sc_pair <- sigma_lambda * exp(-phi_lambda * pt_e$distance)
            sc_pair[pt_e$relation == "self"] <- sigma_lambda
            lam_e <- c(rep(1, B), pmax(0.05, sc_pair))
            sc_e <- c(rep(NA_real_, B), sc_pair)
        } else {
            lam_e <- rep(1, B)
            sc_e <- rep(NA_real_, B)
        }
        beta_blocks[[e]] <- matrix(rep(m0_e, TT), nrow = TT, byrow = TRUE)
        colnames(beta_blocks[[e]]) <- colnames(X_blocks[[e]])
        lambda_blocks[[e]] <- lam_e
        lambda_scale_blocks[[e]] <- sc_e
        state_sd_blocks[[e]] <- sd_e
        m0_blocks[[e]] <- m0_e
        C0_blocks[[e]] <- C0_e
    }

    n_save <- floor((n_iter - burn) / thin)
    betaT_save <- lambda_save <- vector("list", E)
    for(e in seq_len(E)){
        betaT_save[[e]] <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n_save, ncol = ncol(X_blocks[[e]]))
        lambda_save[[e]] <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n_save, ncol = ncol(X_blocks[[e]]))
    }

    loglik_trace <- numeric(n_iter)
    accept_trace <- numeric(n_iter)
    lambda_fit_sum <- matrix(0, nrow = TT, ncol = E)

    start_time <- Sys.time()
    if(verbose) message("Starting ", label, " at ", format(start_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"))

    save_id <- 0
    for(it in seq_len(n_iter)){
        eta <- sandnm_compute_eta_blocks_scaled(X_blocks, beta_blocks, lambda_blocks)
        omega_vec <- sandnm_rpg_vec(as.vector(bmat), as.vector(eta - log_r))
        Omega <- matrix(omega_vec, nrow = TT, ncol = E)
        Ystar <- log_r + kappa / Omega

        loglik_it <- 0
        for(e in seq_len(E)){
            X_scaled <- sweep(X_blocks[[e]], 2, lambda_blocks[[e]], `*`)
            ff <- sandnm_ffbs_univ_dlm(
                y = Ystar[, e], omega = Omega[, e], X = X_scaled,
                W_diag = state_sd_blocks[[e]]^2, m0 = m0_blocks[[e]],
                C0 = C0_blocks[[e]], sample_state = TRUE
            )
            beta_blocks[[e]] <- ff$theta
            loglik_it <- loglik_it + ff$loglik
        }
        loglik_trace[it] <- loglik_it

        if(it %% lambda_update_every == 0){
            accept <- 0
            total_prop <- 0
            eta <- sandnm_compute_eta_blocks_scaled(X_blocks, beta_blocks, lambda_blocks)
            for(e in seq_len(E)){
                p_e <- ncol(X_blocks[[e]])
                if(p_e <= B) next
                for(col in (B + 1):p_e){
                    total_prop <- total_prop + 1
                    lam_curr <- lambda_blocks[[e]][col]
                    lam_prop <- exp(log(lam_curr) + rnorm(1, 0, mh_step))
                    x_t <- X_blocks[[e]][, col]
                    beta_t <- beta_blocks[[e]][, col]
                    eta_prop <- eta[, e] - lam_curr * beta_t * x_t + lam_prop * beta_t * x_t
                    res_curr <- Ystar[, e] - eta[, e]
                    res_prop <- Ystar[, e] - eta_prop
                    ll_diff <- -0.5 * sum(Omega[, e] * (res_prop^2 - res_curr^2))
                    sc <- lambda_scale_blocks[[e]][col]
                    lp_curr <- sandnm_log_half_cauchy(lam_curr, sc) + log(lam_curr)
                    lp_prop <- sandnm_log_half_cauchy(lam_prop, sc) + log(lam_prop)
                    if(log(runif(1)) < ll_diff + lp_prop - lp_curr){
                        lambda_blocks[[e]][col] <- lam_prop
                        eta[, e] <- eta_prop
                        accept <- accept + 1
                    }
                }
            }
            accept_trace[it] <- accept / max(total_prop, 1)
        }

        if(it > burn && ((it - burn) %% thin == 0)){
            save_id <- save_id + 1
            eta_save <- pmin(pmax(sandnm_compute_eta_blocks_scaled(X_blocks, beta_blocks, lambda_blocks), -8), 8)
            lambda_fit_sum <- lambda_fit_sum + exp(eta_save)
            for(e in seq_len(E)){
                betaT_save[[e]][save_id, ] <- beta_blocks[[e]][TT, ]
                lambda_save[[e]][save_id, ] <- lambda_blocks[[e]]
            }
        }

        if(verbose && (it == 1 || it %% progress_every == 0 || it == n_iter)){
            msg <- sandnm_eta_message(label, it, n_iter, start_time)
            if(it %% lambda_update_every == 0){
                idx0 <- max(1, it - progress_every + 1)
                msg <- paste0(msg, " | lambda accept = ", round(mean(accept_trace[idx0:it]), 3))
            }
            message(msg)
        }
    }

    return(list(
        type = "shrinkage-block", label = label, pair_table = pair_table,
        X_blocks = X_blocks, beta_blocks_last = beta_blocks,
        lambda_blocks_last = lambda_blocks, betaT_save = betaT_save,
        lambda_save = lambda_save, loglik_trace = loglik_trace,
        accept_trace = accept_trace,
        working_log_RB = sandnm_log_hmean_exp(loglik_trace[(burn + 1):n_iter]),
        lambda_fit_mean = lambda_fit_sum / max(save_id, 1), burn = burn,
        thin = thin, r_pg = r_pg, state_sd_blocks = state_sd_blocks,
        t_train = TT, t_start = t_start, steps_day = steps_day,
        harmonics = harmonics, center = center, scale_x = scale_x
    ))
}

#' Posterior mean fitted intensity for a block SANDNM object.
sandnm_posterior_mean_intensity <- function(fit){
    if(!is.null(fit$lambda_fit_mean)) return(fit$lambda_fit_mean)
    if(fit$type == "fixed-block"){
        eta <- sandnm_compute_eta_blocks(fit$X_blocks, fit$theta_blocks_last)
    } else if(fit$type == "shrinkage-block"){
        eta <- sandnm_compute_eta_blocks_scaled(fit$X_blocks, fit$beta_blocks_last, fit$lambda_blocks_last)
    } else {
        stop("Unsupported fit type.")
    }
    return(exp(pmin(pmax(eta, -8), 8)))
}

#' Single future design row for one edge block.
sandnm_make_Xrow_future_block <- function(y_lag, pair_block, t_global,
                                          steps_day = 48, harmonics = 2,
                                          center = log(8), scale_x = 2){
    B <- sandnm_baseline_dim(harmonics)
    sfeat <- sandnm_season_features(t_global, steps_day, harmonics)
    x_lag <- (log1p(y_lag) - center) / scale_x
    q <- nrow(pair_block)
    xrow <- numeric(B + q)
    xrow[1] <- 1
    if(B > 1) xrow[2:B] <- sfeat
    if(q > 0) xrow[B + seq_len(q)] <- x_lag[pair_block$source]
    return(xrow)
}

#' Recursive forecast for a block SANDNM object.
sandnm_forecast_recursive_blocks <- function(fit, y_last_train, H, max_draws = 80,
                                             seed = NULL, simulate_counts = TRUE,
                                             eta_clip = c(-8, 8)){
    if(!is.null(seed)) set.seed(seed)
    if(!fit$type %in% c("fixed-block", "shrinkage-block")){
        stop("Only fixed-block and shrinkage-block fits are supported.")
    }
    E <- length(fit$X_blocks)
    pair_blocks <- attr(fit$X_blocks, "pair_blocks")
    if(fit$type == "fixed-block") S <- nrow(fit$thetaT_save[[1]]) else S <- nrow(fit$betaT_save[[1]])
    if(is.null(S) || length(S) != 1 || is.na(S) || S < 1) stop("No saved terminal posterior draws found.")
    draw_id <- unique(round(seq(1, S, length.out = min(max_draws, S))))
    D <- length(draw_id)
    lambda_draws <- array(NA_real_, dim = c(D, H, E))
    y_draws <- array(NA_real_, dim = c(D, H, E))

    for(dd in seq_along(draw_id)){
        s <- draw_id[dd]
        y_prev <- as.numeric(y_last_train)
        if(fit$type == "fixed-block"){
            state_blocks <- vector("list", E)
            for(e in seq_len(E)) state_blocks[[e]] <- as.numeric(fit$thetaT_save[[e]][s, ])
            for(h in seq_len(H)){
                t_global <- fit$t_start + fit$t_train + h - 1
                lambda_h <- numeric(E)
                for(e in seq_len(E)){
                    state_blocks[[e]] <- state_blocks[[e]] + rnorm(length(state_blocks[[e]]), 0, fit$state_sd_blocks[[e]])
                    xrow <- sandnm_make_Xrow_future_block(y_prev, pair_blocks[[e]], t_global, fit$steps_day, fit$harmonics, fit$center, fit$scale_x)
                    eta_e <- sum(xrow * state_blocks[[e]])
                    eta_e <- min(max(eta_e, eta_clip[1]), eta_clip[2])
                    lambda_h[e] <- exp(eta_e)
                }
                lambda_draws[dd, h, ] <- lambda_h
                y_new <- if(simulate_counts) rpois(E, lambda_h) else lambda_h
                y_draws[dd, h, ] <- y_new
                y_prev <- y_new
            }
        } else {
            beta_blocks <- lambda_blocks <- vector("list", E)
            for(e in seq_len(E)){
                beta_blocks[[e]] <- as.numeric(fit$betaT_save[[e]][s, ])
                lambda_blocks[[e]] <- as.numeric(fit$lambda_save[[e]][s, ])
            }
            for(h in seq_len(H)){
                t_global <- fit$t_start + fit$t_train + h - 1
                lambda_h <- numeric(E)
                for(e in seq_len(E)){
                    beta_blocks[[e]] <- beta_blocks[[e]] + rnorm(length(beta_blocks[[e]]), 0, fit$state_sd_blocks[[e]])
                    xrow <- sandnm_make_Xrow_future_block(y_prev, pair_blocks[[e]], t_global, fit$steps_day, fit$harmonics, fit$center, fit$scale_x)
                    eta_e <- sum(xrow * lambda_blocks[[e]] * beta_blocks[[e]])
                    eta_e <- min(max(eta_e, eta_clip[1]), eta_clip[2])
                    lambda_h[e] <- exp(eta_e)
                }
                lambda_draws[dd, h, ] <- lambda_h
                y_new <- if(simulate_counts) rpois(E, lambda_h) else lambda_h
                y_draws[dd, h, ] <- y_new
                y_prev <- y_new
            }
        }
    }
    return(list(
        type = paste0(fit$type, "-forecast"), label = fit$label,
        lambda_draws = lambda_draws, y_draws = y_draws,
        lambda_mean = apply(lambda_draws, c(2, 3), mean),
        lambda_lower = apply(lambda_draws, c(2, 3), quantile, probs = 0.025),
        lambda_upper = apply(lambda_draws, c(2, 3), quantile, probs = 0.975),
        y_mean = apply(y_draws, c(2, 3), mean),
        y_lower = apply(y_draws, c(2, 3), quantile, probs = 0.025),
        y_upper = apply(y_draws, c(2, 3), quantile, probs = 0.975),
        H = H, E = E, n_draws = D
    ))
}

#' Score recursive forecast output.
sandnm_score_forecast_blocks <- function(fc, Y_test, Lambda_test){
    Lambda_hat <- fc$lambda_mean
    Y_hat <- fc$y_mean
    coverage_indicator <- Lambda_test >= fc$lambda_lower & Lambda_test <= fc$lambda_upper
    return(data.frame(
        model = fc$label,
        forecast_log_score = mean(dpois(as.vector(Y_test), lambda = as.vector(Lambda_hat), log = TRUE)),
        RMSE_lambda_test = sqrt(mean((Lambda_hat - Lambda_test)^2)),
        MAE_lambda_test = mean(abs(Lambda_hat - Lambda_test)),
        MAE_count_test = mean(abs(Y_hat - Y_test)),
        MAE_total_flow_test = mean(abs(rowSums(Lambda_hat) - rowSums(Y_test))),
        coverage_lambda_95 = mean(coverage_indicator, na.rm = TRUE)
    ))
}

#' Score in-sample fitted intensity.
sandnm_score_fit_blocks <- function(fit, Y, Lambda_true){
    Lambda_hat <- sandnm_posterior_mean_intensity(fit)
    return(data.frame(
        model = fit$label,
        model_type = fit$type,
        in_sample_RMSE_lambda = sqrt(mean((Lambda_hat - Lambda_true)^2)),
        in_sample_MAE_lambda = mean(abs(Lambda_hat - Lambda_true)),
        in_sample_MAE_count = mean(abs(Lambda_hat - Y)),
        in_sample_total_flow_MAE = mean(abs(rowSums(Lambda_hat) - rowSums(Y))),
        in_sample_poisson_log_score = mean(dpois(as.vector(Y), lambda = as.vector(Lambda_hat), log = TRUE)),
        working_log_RB = fit$working_log_RB
    ))
}

#' Lag-correlation summary by edge-pair relation.
sandnm_neighbor_correlation_summary <- function(Y, pair_table){
    TT <- nrow(Y)
    out <- pair_table
    out$corr <- NA_real_
    for(l in seq_len(nrow(pair_table))){
        target <- pair_table$target[l]
        source <- pair_table$source[l]
        out$corr[l] <- suppressWarnings(cor(Y[seq_len(TT - 1), source], Y[2:TT, target]))
    }
    return(out)
}

#' Summarize shrinkage scales by edge pair.
sandnm_shrinkage_pair_summary <- function(fit_shrinkage, true_pair_table = NULL, threshold = 0.03){
    if(fit_shrinkage$type != "shrinkage-block") stop("fit_shrinkage must have type 'shrinkage-block'.")
    pair_blocks <- attr(fit_shrinkage$X_blocks, "pair_blocks")
    B <- sandnm_baseline_dim(fit_shrinkage$harmonics)
    E <- length(pair_blocks)
    out_list <- vector("list", E)
    for(e in seq_len(E)){
        pt_e <- pair_blocks[[e]]
        q_e <- nrow(pt_e)
        if(q_e == 0) next
        lam_e <- fit_shrinkage$lambda_save[[e]][, B + seq_len(q_e), drop = FALSE]
        betaT_e <- fit_shrinkage$betaT_save[[e]][, B + seq_len(q_e), drop = FALSE]
        thetaT_e <- lam_e * betaT_e
        tmp <- pt_e
        tmp$lambda_mean <- colMeans(lam_e, na.rm = TRUE)
        tmp$lambda_median <- apply(lam_e, 2, median, na.rm = TRUE)
        tmp$lambda_q025 <- apply(lam_e, 2, quantile, probs = 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)
        tmp$lambda_q975 <- apply(lam_e, 2, quantile, probs = 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)
        tmp$abs_thetaT_mean <- colMeans(abs(thetaT_e), na.rm = TRUE)
        tmp$selected_lambda <- tmp$lambda_mean > threshold
        out_list[[e]] <- tmp
    }
    out <- do.call(rbind, out_list)
    rownames(out) <- NULL
    if(!is.null(true_pair_table)){
        key_true <- paste(true_pair_table$target, true_pair_table$source, sep = "_")
        key_out <- paste(out$target, out$source, sep = "_")
        idx <- match(key_out, key_true)
        out$true_active <- ifelse(is.na(idx), FALSE, true_pair_table$true_active[idx])
        out$selection_type <- ifelse(out$selected_lambda & out$true_active, "TP",
                                     ifelse(out$selected_lambda & !out$true_active, "FP",
                                            ifelse(!out$selected_lambda & out$true_active, "FN", "TN")))
    }
    return(out)
}

#' MCMC diagnostic for one scalar trace.
sandnm_mcmc_diag_one <- function(x, name = "parameter"){
    x <- as.numeric(x)
    x <- x[is.finite(x)]
    if(length(x) < 10){
        return(data.frame(parameter = name, n_draws = length(x), mean = NA_real_, sd = NA_real_,
                          ESS = NA_real_, MCSE = NA_real_, MCSE_over_sd = NA_real_,
                          acf_lag1 = NA_real_, acf_lag10 = NA_real_, acf_lag30 = NA_real_))
    }
    if(requireNamespace("coda", quietly = TRUE)){
        ess <- as.numeric(coda::effectiveSize(x))
    } else {
        ess <- length(x)
    }
    sx <- sd(x)
    mcse <- sx / sqrt(ess)
    ac <- stats::acf(x, plot = FALSE, lag.max = 30)$acf[, 1, 1]
    return(data.frame(parameter = name, n_draws = length(x), mean = mean(x), sd = sx,
                      ESS = ess, MCSE = mcse, MCSE_over_sd = mcse / sx,
                      acf_lag1 = ac[2], acf_lag10 = ac[11], acf_lag30 = ac[31]))
}
```
